name: Summer Basil Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the salad fixings:
- Halve chopped green onions
- Halve chopped green, yellow, or red sweet peppers
- Halve lightly steamed and cooled green beans or asparagus
- Halve chopped carrot
- Halve chopped zucchini
- 3/4 cup Golden raisins (do not substitute)
- 1/2 cup finely chopped fresh basil
- 1/2 cup chopped fresh parsley
2. Add one of the following for carbs, depending on your preference:
- 16 ounces dry fusilli (or any pasta, whole wheat is fine), boiled
- 1 cup cooked dry brown rice
- Combine with 1 cup cooked dry couscous (soak for 20 minutes in 1 1/3 cups boiling water)
- Or combine with other grains such as quinoa, barley, or whatever you like
Optional: Add beans (white, garbanzos, black) to the pasta or grains for extra nutrition.
